summary: Sales Convert Deal Dialog Feature - All tests PASS. When Sales user clicks 'Project Onboarded' stage button in lead detail dialog, the full CRE-style 'Create Project from Deal' dialog appears with all required fields. Backend API tests confirm Sales role can access /api/cre/convert-deal and /api/cre/convert-re-project endpoints.
seed_data_creation: Used existing leads: TEST_RoughReq_ef8f94 (Rough Estimate Requested stage), Mr. Vinoth (RE - From Planning stage)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sales Convert Deal dialog is fully functional. The intercept triggers when clicking 'Project Onboarded' stage button for a lead without project_created flag. Dialog includes: RE Reference section (if lead has RE project), Project Details (name, location, sqft, building type, start date), Client Details (name, phone, email), Advance Payment with MultiPaymentInput component, and Accountant Verification checkbox. Cancel/Escape closes dialog without moving lead.

feature_1_sales_login.description: Login as Sales user via Demo Access tab
feature_1_sales_login.evidence: Successfully logged in as Divya Pillai (Sales)

feature_2_kanban_board.description: Kanban board loads with all stages including 'Project Onboarded'
feature_2_kanban_board.evidence: Screenshot shows Kanban with stages: New Appointment, Discussion, Site Visit, Rough Estimate Requested, RE - From Planning, RE - To Client, Deal Closed, Project Onboarded

feature_3_convert_deal_dialog_trigger.description: Clicking 'Project Onboarded' stage button opens 'Create Project from Deal' dialog
feature_3_convert_deal_dialog_trigger.evidence: Dialog appeared with title 'Create Project from Deal' and subtitle 'Review and edit project details, then collect advance payment'

feature_4_dialog_fields.description: Dialog has all required fields: Project Name, Location, sqft, Building Type, Start Date, Client Name, Phone, Email, Advance Amount, Accountant checkbox
feature_4_dialog_fields.evidence: All fields verified with data-testid attributes: convert-project-name, convert-location, convert-client-name, convert-advance-amount, convert-accountant-checkbox

feature_5_re_reference_section.description: RE Reference section shows when lead has linked RE project
feature_5_re_reference_section.evidence: Screenshot shows 'Rough Estimate Reference' section with Project, Area, Timeline, Value fields

feature_6_multi_payment_input.description: MultiPaymentInput appears when advance amount is entered
feature_6_multi_payment_input.evidence: Screenshot shows payment entry with Bank Transfer dropdown, amount field, Ref/Txn ID field, and '+ Add Payment' button

feature_7_cancel_behavior.description: Cancel/Escape closes dialog without moving lead to Project Onboarded
feature_7_cancel_behavior.evidence: After pressing Escape, dialog closed and lead remained in 'Rough Estimate Requested' stage

feature_8_backend_sales_access.description: Sales role can access POST /api/cre/convert-deal/{lead_id} endpoint
feature_8_backend_sales_access.evidence: Backend test test_03_sales_convert_deal_endpoint_access PASSED - Sales did not get 403 Forbidden

feature_9_backend_convert_re_project.description: Sales role can access POST /api/cre/convert-re-project/{re_project_id} endpoint

frontend_intercept.logic: When stage.name === 'Project Onboarded' and lead has no project_created flag, calls openConvertDealFromSales(lead)

frontend_dialog.fields: RE Reference, Project Details, Client Details, Advance Payment with MultiPaymentInput, Accountant Verification checkbox
